title: [RJ01121670] 目指せ!ゴブリンマスター 完全版 v1.0.1
description:
Go for it, Goblin Master! Complete Edition

■ゲーム概要

見下ろし型のアクションゲーム×拠点経営のシミュレーションゲーム!

ゴブリンたちを率いて村を襲い、
略奪の限りを尽くして女の子を誘拐しよう!

誘拐した女の子は拠点で孕み袋として種付けし、
どんどんゴブリンを産ませよう。

そうしてゴブリンたちを増やし、鍛え上げ、
人間どもにゴブリンの恐ろしさを教えてやろう!

そして今回、完全版としてパワーアップ!

※アーリーアクセス版を購入済みの方はこの製品ではなく、アップデートパッチをお求めください!

■ゲーム詳細

襲撃パートは見下ろし型のアクションゲーム!
味方のゴブリンたちに指示を出すことで一緒に戦ったり女の子を効率的に探すことができるぞ。
倒した女の子はその場で犯せば士気が上がって攻撃力が上がっていくぞ!

拠点に連れ帰った女の子を孕ませよう!
強いゴブリンとかけ合わせれば
さらに強いゴブリンの子が生まれるぞ!
両親のスキルを引き継ぐので、新しいスキルを持った女の子をどんどん捕まえて孕まそう!

拠点パートはコマンド式のシミュレーション!
女の子を最初は1人しか収容できないが、増築することでたくさん収容できるぞ。
一気に孕ませて軍団を強くしよう!

■完全版での追加要素

■拠点で建築できる施設の追加
休息所、食糧庫、囚人部屋、監視塔、訓練所……
それぞれ強力な効果を持った施設が建築可能になったぞ!

拠点を強化して効率的な拠点経営を目指そう!

■ユニークキャラの追加
村一番の娘、女騎士、姫様といったユニークキャラが追加されたぞ!
彼女たちは孕み袋として優れた能力を持っている。
拠点で種付けしたら特殊なイベントも発生するぞ。

ぜひ捕まえて優秀なゴブリンを産ませよう!


目指せ!ゴブリンマスター 完全版 

■3Pの追加
基本体位をいくつか追加し、さらに襲撃中や拠点での種付で3Pが可能になったぞ。
複数人で犯せば士気も上がりやすい。

女どもをみんなで犯してブチ上げていこう!

■完全版での追加要素2


目指せ!ゴブリンマスター 完全版 [Talon.company]

■武器システムの追加
襲撃では剣や槍や斧など、こんぼう以外にも武器を獲得できるぞ。
それぞれ攻撃力やリーチ、コンボ数などが異なる。

ゴブリンたちに強力な武器を装備させて、軍団をさらに強化しよう!


目指せ!ゴブリンマスター 完全版 [Talon.company]

■人間による拠点襲撃の追加
人間たちが定期的に拠点に襲撃を仕掛けてくるようになったぞ。
迎撃に成功すると優れた武器が手に入る。

鍛えたゴブリンたちで迎撃し、どちらが上か分からせてやろう。


目指せ!ゴブリンマスター 完全版 [Talon.company]

■城マップの追加
イベントが進むと城にも攻め込めるようになるぞ。
城の敵が強力だが、物資が多く優秀な特性の女の子も捕まえやすい。
多くのゴブリンたちで攻め込んで戦利品を持って帰ろう。

■その他の細かい調整
・全体的なパフォーマンス向上
・拠点パートの見下ろしカメラや孕み袋のサブカメラの操作が可能に
・食料採集コマンドの追加
・自動で犯す、自動で連れ帰るオプションの追加
・武器スイングなど各種エフェクトの強化


■このゲームについて

※このゲームのイラストはAIをもとに作成されています。

※3DゲームのためPCスペックが一定水準必要です。体験版で動作確認をお願いします。

※現Verでは英語、中国語ともに未対応です(The English and Chinese languages are currently not supported.)

※今後のアップデートは以下を予定しています。
・英語、中国語対応(Translation to English and Chinese.)
・コントローラー対応
・音量のコンフィグ機能

この作品は
「目指せ!ゴブリンマスター(RJ402211)」
「目指せ!ゴブリンマスター 完全版アップデートパッチ(RJ01124011)」
と内容の重複があります。


------------------------

■Addition of Castle Map
As the event progresses, you will be able to invade castles.
Enemies in the castle are powerful, but it is easy to catch girls with many supplies and excellent characteristics.
Let's attack with many goblins and bring back the loot.

Other minor adjustments
Overall performance improvements
The overlooking camera in the base part and the sub-camera in the impregnation bag can now be controlled.
Addition of food gathering commands.
Addition of automatic rape and automatic take back options.
Enhanced various effects such as weapon swings


■About this game

Illustrations in this game are based on AI.

*The game is a 3D game and requires a certain level of PC specs. Please check the operation with the trial version.

The English and Chinese languages are currently not supported.
Translation to English and Chinese.
Controller support
Volume configurator function.

This work is
Aim! Goblin Master (RJ402211)
Goblin Master (RJ01124011) Goblin Master Full Version Update Patch (RJ01124011)
Goblin Master Complete Update Patch (RJ01124011)".

title: [RJ386558] Ark Mobius
description:
[Gameplay]
This game uses auto-saving.

In the year 2320, a massive, tentacled monster knowns as "The Black Goat" appeared. It had the ability to induce madness, and could only be harmed by magical energy. Unfortunately, the the overabundance of pollution had all but drained the world of that energy.

It's up to you to go to another world, receive magical powers from a beautiful girl, and return home to save humanity!

[Rhythm Gameplay]
A rhythm game that can be controlled with just a mouse! Work your way through side-scrolling stages facing off against a variety of enemies in time with the music! We recommend headphones for the best possible experience. And if you're not good at rhythm games, you can lock your HP!
Scene Puzzles:
Visit different places related to the girls and advance the story!

[Multiple Endings]
Each girl has multiple endings. Warmth, catharsis, disaster... it's all up to you and your choices. No need to worry about branching paths. After clearing the first week, the free mode will be unlocked, so you can advance through the story however you want.

[H Scene]
Lots and lots of CGs!
Important scenes are animated via Live2D.

title: [RJ212899] Lord Knight Komplex - Knightess in the Magic Castle
description:
* Product description

A side-scrolling action RPG with the female Lord Knight from R*gnarok Onl*ne as the protagonist.
However, the game can be enjoyed even if you aren't familiar with the source material!

In this 2.5D game (a 2D scroller made using almost entirely 3D models),
you play as the Knightess Emilia, and use swords, knives, tomahawks, and more to destroy your enemies.
Gather power-up items, and blast through the fields and dungeons!

If enemy attacks bring you to 0 HP, or you receive consecutive attacks, you will go down.
If you have HP, you can still get back up, but if monsters catch you in your downed state,
you'll be violated on the spot!

Featuring over 20 types of enemies such as bandits, orcs, mermen, tentacle monsters, insects, and fish!
H scenes can be viewed afterward in Gallery Mode, and with full 3D, you can view them from any angle you like!

To unlock scenes in the Gallery, simply defeat or be defeated by the corresponding monster.
There is no need to purposely lose to unlock scenes.

There is no Game Over; even if your HP reaches 0, you'll respawn at a save point,
and you can continue your journey immediately!

* Trial version
The trial version includes one area, with some specially placed monsters that usually aren't there.
The trial version includes 7 H scenes in total (all can be viewed in the Gallery)
Save data from the trial version cannot be transferred to the full product.

* This product was created using Unity3D.
Please confirm your PC meets the minimal system requirements,
and test the trial version before purchase to confirm compatibility.
If the game runs slowly on your device, first try adjusting the in-game settings.

* For those who simply want to view the Gallery, full-unlock data is included

title: [RJ359848] Sirberia Front
description:
Fictitious Early Modern War SLG

* Note
All characters in this game are over 18.
This game requires DirectX 9.0.
https://www.microsoft.com/en-US/download/details.aspx?id=35
Please play the demo to confirm compatibility.

* Story
Alexander Calendar 837
3 years after the largest war ever began, I'm appointed to be a commander of UN army, sent to the front of Iraq. The evil organization, Sidra, subverted the world in only 3 years. Many countries have fallen. Berlin, the old headquarter of UN, was taken, too.
Our flame of hope hasn't gone. We, UN army, fighting for ideal and justice of human beings, have set up new fronts again in Northern Europe and Africa. It's time to fight back now.

* Content

Fictitious Early Modern War SLG

Defeat the evil organization Sidra to save the world as a commander of UN Army. You could join the northern front or the southern front. The heroine characters change depending on your choice.
You’ll unlock Sidra Route later to destroy the world and conquer women. There are some torturing events to the UN female commanders.

Heroines x9
Basic CG 50+ with Animation

title: [RJ01118696] The Harem Life of Peerless Swordsmen
description:
"The Harem Life of Peerless Swordsmen" is a pure love style, quintessential RPG game. You can form a team with up to six female adventurers for joint ventures. Once you gain a certain level of fame in the city, you'll become immensely popular. Many unsatisfied beauties in the city will yearn for a passionate encounter with you.

Do you want to enjoy erotic content while playing a game? This game is perfect for you!
1. Diverse Character Professions and Teamwork!
The protagonist's team includes a variety of professions such as Sword Master, Mage, Item Master (Healer), Assassin, and Heavy Warrior.
Each profession has different combat methods and skills, making the game's battles diverse and fun!


2. Enjoyable Sexual Encounters!
There are a total of 10 characters with whom you can have sexual relations.
Indulge in lovemaking with the girls to your heart's content!

3. Stress-Free, Relaxing Gameplay!
This is a completely pure love RPG game, with no rape or defeat penalties.
Even beginners can fully enjoy the game while sipping tea and playing!


4. Collect and Craft Rare Equipment!
The game contains 21 types of weapons, 44 types of armor, 30 types of accessories, and 34 types of materials.
They will gradually become available as you progress through the game. With the game's equipment crafting system, you can fully enjoy the fun of collecting and crafting.

【Material Declaration】

The game character sprites and HCGs are products of Gee-kun soft, acquired from the Booth store and the official RPG Maker store, all with commercial licenses. The remaining part of the HCGs were commissioned from Pixiv with a commercial license. All other materials used in the game are also sourced from legitimate stores with commercial licenses.
【Game Specifications】

■ Pure Love Style Classic RPG
■ Basic HCG 23 pieces
■ A total of 10 characters with whom sexual relationships can occur
■ Screen size: 1280 × 720
■ Dialogue Voiceover: None (includes female moaning and panting sounds during sexual scenes)
■ Features a Recollection Room (fully unlockable after completing the game)
■ Estimated playtime: Approximately 4-7 hours
■ Developed using RPG Maker MZ

title: [RJ376315] Kaiju Princess
description:
The player plays a general office worker, life is nothing new and exciting.
One day, the man left a message on the homestay website. This website is specially designed for homeless women.
However, the woman who came to the boarding house was a person with strange clothes and claimed she was the princess of Kaiju.
The player will have one deal with this girl.

In this period, the player will provide shelter and life needs, and the mysterious girl will reward player with intercourse.
Unfortunately, after living together, the player will find that the woman is an alien invader.
She can summon kaijus and command them. Even if we expel her, there will still be other invaders coming again.
Our only chance to save the planet is assisting her meet the minimum destruction requirements. So we volunteered to be her supporter.
In the limited time, minimize damage in our city and death. However, we need to avoid tracing by government organizations and meet the minimum requirements for injury. Don't forget, the last and most important part ----- a happy and exciting cohabitation life with her.

title: [RJ436659] ヒュプノシスレイム ～ 楽園の催淫巫女
description:
Hypnosis Flame ~ Aphrodisiac Shrine Maiden of Paradise

楽園の巫女を堕とせ! Live2Dで楽しむ催眠シミュレーションゲーム!

催眠能力を手に入れた"あなた"は憧れの存在であった博麗霊夢に催眠をかけることに成功する。
霊夢の身体を開発し、深い催眠に堕とすことで、楽園の巫女を"あなた"のものにしよう。

【ゲーム概要】
・日常コマンドや調教コマンド等を実行することで霊夢を堕とす催眠シミュレーションゲームです。
・催眠の種類は「認識改変」「淫乱化」「命令服従」「恋人化」の4種類が最終的に選択できます。
・マウスのみで操作します。

【CG内容など】
・立ち絵や調教シーンなどはすべてLive2Dアニメーション対応
・立ち絵差分
　〇服装(通常・下着・全裸)
　〇胸(貧乳・普乳・巨乳)
　〇ふたなり
　〇母乳　　などなど
・調教シーン
　〇コマンド約30種類
　〇立ち絵と同様の差分
　〇調教シーンはほぼフルボイス

【クレジット】
・BGM
Ibiza さま(https://twitter.com/Ibiza_toubu )
・ボイス(博麗霊夢)
陽向葵ゅかさま(https://twitter.com/yukanyan2525 )
・その他
さんぴょん(https://ci-en.dlsite.com/creator/8314 )

本作品は「サークル獏」様製作のeraシリーズ、および有志の方々が制作したeratohoシリーズに大いに影響を受けて制作しております。

【更新履歴】
2023/11/25:製品版(ver.1.00)リリース
2023/11/25:製品版(ver.1.01)リリース
2023/11/27:製品版(ver.1.02)リリース

詳細な修正内容は下記Ci-en内の記事をご覧ください。
https://ci-en.dlsite.com/creator/8314/article/1004764

日常シーン
・日常シーンでは会話やスキンシップをして霊夢の催眠度を高めることができます。
・その他にも修行をして一日の行動可能量を増やしたり、賽銭をして霊夢に貢いだりできます。
・催眠が深まるにつれ、実行できるコマンドが増えていきます。

調教シーン

ヒュプノシスレイム ～ 楽園の催淫巫女 [Pyon-Pyon-Pyon]

・調教シーンでは約30種類のコマンドが選択可能です。
・選択したコマンド、キャラクターの能力値に応じて、経験点が取得できます。
・ほぼ全てのコマンドに対してフルボイス&Live2dに対応しています。

ステータス画面
・調教シーンや日常シーンで得た経験点で、各種性的な能力値を上昇させます。
・能力値は調教シーンでのキャラクターの反応の変化や、新たな催眠種の開放などに影響します。

アイテム購入
・霊夢の取得経験値に応じて増加する所持金を使用してアイテムを購入することができます。
・強力なコマンドを解放する調教道具や体質を変える薬、能力値を向上させるアビリティカードが購入できます。

音楽
・前作から引き続き、ゲーム内で使用している楽曲はIbizaさまにアレンジしていただいております。

------------------------------
DeepL Translation:

Corrupt the Priestess of Paradise! Hypnotic simulation game with Live2D!

You have acquired the ability of hypnosis and succeeded in hypnotizing Reimu Hakurei, whom you have longed for.
Develop Reimu's body and put her into a deep hypnosis to make the priestess of paradise yours.

Game Outline
This is a hypnosis simulation game in which you can put Reimu into hypnosis by executing daily commands, training commands, etc. The type of hypnosis is "Recognition Hypnosis".
You can choose from four types of hypnosis: "alteration of perception," "lewdness," "obedience to commands," and "making love" at the end.
The game is controlled with the mouse only.


CG contents, etc.
-Live2D animation is supported for all standing pictures and training scenes.
-Standing picture difference
　〇Clothes (normal, underwear, nude)
　〇Breasts (normal, normal breast, and big breast)
　〇Busty (normal, normal breast, big breast)
　〇Mother's milk, etc.
-Training Scenes
　〇About 30 kinds of commands
　〇Differences as same as the standing pictures.
　〇Almost all training scenes are fully voiced.


Credits

BGM
Mr. Ibiza (https://twitter.com/Ibiza_toubu )

Voice (Reimu Hakurei)
Kyuka Hiyomukai (https://twitter.com/yukanyan2525 )

Others
Sanpyon (https://ci-en.dlsite.com/creator/8314 )

This work was greatly influenced by the era series created by Baku Circle and the eratoho series created by volunteers.


Update History
2023/11/25: Commercial version (ver. 1.00) is released.
11/25/2023: Commercial version (ver. 1.01) released
11/27/2023: Commercial version (ver. 1.02) released

Please refer to the article in Ci-en below for the detailed modifications.
https://ci-en.dlsite.com/creator/8314/article/1004764

Everyday Scenes
-In daily scenes, you can increase Reimu's hypnosis level through conversation and skinship.
-In addition, you can increase the amount of daily activities by practicing, and you can pay Reimu with money by offering money.
-The more hypnotized you are, the more commands you can perform.

Training Scenes

Hypnosis Reimu: Hypnosis Priestess of Paradise [Pyon-Pyon-Pyon].

About 30 commands can be selected for the training scene.
-Experience points can be obtained according to the selected commands and the character's ability values.
-Almost all commands are fully voiced and Live2d compatible.

Status Screen
-The experience points obtained from the training scenes and daily scenes are used to increase various sexual ability values.
-The ability values affect the character's reactions in the training scenes and the opening of new hypnotic species.

Item Purchase
-Items can be purchased by using the money that is increased according to the experience acquired by Reimu.
-You can purchase training tools that release powerful commands, medicines that change the constitution, and ability cards that improve ability values.

Music

New Heroine
Einomaru
Home Town Observer and back-up supporter to the protagonist and his team.
It turns out that all this time, she was a girl with hopes and dreams of becoming a world famous idol. Armed with a lovely singing voice, elegant dance moves, and pistols akimbo, she aims to become the zombie ravaged world's #1 idol!


Several weeks following the events of SOD: SH. just as peace was finally starting to return to Home Town, Einomaru went missing during a patrol.
Fearing the presence of a new enemy, the protag and his team set out on a search and rescue mission to find her.
However, what they found was their missing girl mesmerizing a horde of Zs with her skillful song and dance!

Despite having fended off the zombies up until now, it was clear a menacing new type of mob is making its way toward Home Town.
Their only way out of this desperate situation, is to charm their enemies using the power of song.
Thus began their journey into idoldom...to protect the surviving human race!

Story
Added Gameplay: Idol Mode
Become an idol producer and win over the zombie infested world with music!
The heroines are in need of dance lessons, live gigs, and other idol work.
Put on spectacular shows, grow your fan base, and set your sights on becoming a top idol!

Earn money through idol work, then buy items to deepen your relationship with each heroine.
Earn their trust and affection to become even stronger allies in battles against zombies!


Even More H Scenes!


A new heroine means new H scenes!
Plus all-new scenes featuring the original girls!
Get to know Einomaru while deepening your existing relationships!
And that's not all -- there are new stages and new enemies, too!
That means even more ways for the heroines to meet their deeply dirty doom...
And thanks to the brand-new outfits and accessories, they can do it all in style!

15~30 hours of gameplay

1 new heroine
40+ heroine events
6 mini games
30+ defeat scenes
100+ H scenes
4 difficulty levels

100+ items

Actor: Yuki Yudzuru
Actress: Akari Tsumugi

Yudzuru is a student whose Mom hires a tutor (Tsumugi Akari)in hopes of improving his grades.
The female tutor is significantly more mature than him, and this is evident in her attitude, which even carries a slight touch of patronization.
Not fully realizing that Yudzuru is playing 4D chess and he is gaslighting her into doing what he wants.
A truly epic movie with the best acting. And yes, Yuta Aoi is a mere extra here.
